ABS.d: Returns the absolute value of a number.

ACCRINT.d: Returns the accrued interest for a security that pays periodic interest.

ACCRINTM.d: Returns the accrued interest for a security that pays interest at maturity.

ACOS.d: Returns the arccosine of a number, in radians.

ACOSH.d: Returns the inverse hyperbolic cosine of a number.

ACOT.d: Returns the arccotangent of a number, in radians.

ACOTH.d: Returns the inverse hyperbolic cotangent of a number.

ADDRESS.d: Returns a cell address as text, given row and column numbers.

AGGREGATE.d: Returns an aggregate calculation (sum, average, etc.) while ignoring errors or hidden rows.

AVERAGE.d: Returns the average (arithmetic mean) of its arguments.

COUNT.d: Counts the cells in a range that contain numbers.

MAX.d: Returns the largest value in a set of values.

MIN.d: Returns the smallest value in a set of values.

SUM.d: Adds all the numbers in a range of cells.
